metadata.topic: レストランで　ランチを　ちゅうもんする (Ordering lunch at a restaurant)

visual_prompts.image_prompt: A 2×2 grid image with four equal square panels, no borders or dividing lines between panels. Japanese restaurant setting, simple white background, line art food items on a table surface. Top-left panel: A sandwich on a plate, sliced in half to show layered filling. Top-right panel: A bowl of soup with steam rising from the surface, a spoon resting beside it. Bottom-left panel: A salad in a bowl with a fork beside it. Bottom-right panel: Two rice balls on a plate, each wrapped with a strip of nori seaweed. Minimalist black and white line art, Japanese language textbook illustration style, clean monochrome, thick clean outlines, no shading, white background, simple character design, instructional clipart style, high contrast, no text.

tts_script.text: おんなのひとと　おとこのひとが　レストランで　はなしています。おんなのひとは　なにを　たべますか？
このレストランは　いいですね。ぼくは　サンドイッチに　します。
ああ、いいですね。でも、わたしは　けさ　パンを　たべましたから、ほかの　たべものに　します。
じゃあ、サラダは　どうですか？ここのは　おいしいですよ。
ええ、しっています。でも、ひるに　つめたい　ものを　たべましたから、あたたかい　ほうに　します。
おんなのひとは　なにを　たべますか？

transcription.intro: おんなのひとと　おとこのひとが　レストランで　はなしています。おんなのひとは　なにを　たべますか？

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: このレストランは　いいですね。ぼくは　サンドイッチに　します。

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: ああ、いいですね。でも、わたしは　けさ　パンを　たべましたから、ほかの　たべものに　します。

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: じゃあ、サラダは　どうですか？ここのは　おいしいですよ。

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: ええ、しっています。でも、ひるに　つめたい　ものを　たべましたから、あたたかい　ほうに　します。

transcription.question: おんなのひとは　なにを　たべますか？

tr.intro: Bir kadın ve bir adam restoranda konuşuyor. Kadın ne yiyecek?

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: Bu restoran çok güzel. Ben sandviç alacağım.

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: Ah, iyi. Ama ben bu sabah ekmek yediğim için başka bir şey alacağım.

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: O zaman salata nasıl? Buranınki çok lezzetli.

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: Evet, biliyorum. Ama öğle yemeğinde soğuk bir şey yediğim için sıcak bir şey alacağım.

tr.question: Kadın ne yiyecek?

en.intro: A woman and a man are talking at a restaurant. What will the woman eat?

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: This restaurant is great. I'll have a sandwich.

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: Oh, nice. But I had bread this morning, so I'll have something else.

dialogue.speaker: Male_1
dialogue.text: Then how about a salad? The one here is delicious.

dialogue.speaker: Female_1
dialogue.text: Yes, I know. But I had something cold at lunch, so I'll go with something warm.

en.question: What will the woman eat?

grammar.en: the one that is... (used when choosing between options)

logic.tr: Kadın, iki öneriyi reddeder. Erkek önce sandviç önerir; kadın bu sabah ekmek yediğini söyleyerek reddeder (Distractor_A – Panel 1). Ardından salata önerilir; kadın öğle yemeğinde soğuk bir şey yediği için reddeder (Distractor_B – Panel 3). Sonunda sıcak bir şey istediğini belirterek çorbayı seçer (Doğru – Panel 2). Panel 4'teki onigiri hiç diyalogda geçmez; sıcak görünmediği için tuzak görevi görür.
logic.en: The woman rejects two suggestions. The man first proposes a sandwich; she declines because she had bread this morning (Distractor_A – Panel 1). Then salad is suggested; she declines because she had something cold at lunch (Distractor_B – Panel 3). She finally chooses something warm — the soup (Correct – Panel 2). The rice balls in Panel 4 are never mentioned in the dialogue and serve as a trap distractor.
